integration_hint: This derived fixture is loaded automatically for repo-local Enron worlds and is sliced to the active email window.

credit_history.headline: Moody's baseline senior debt rating
credit_history.summary: Enron's senior debt was listed at Baa1 in the 2000 financial highlights.

credit_history.headline: S&P baseline senior debt rating
credit_history.summary: Enron's senior debt was listed at BBB+ in the 2000 financial highlights.

credit_history.headline: Fitch baseline senior debt rating
credit_history.summary: Enron's senior debt was listed at BBB+ in the 2000 financial highlights.

credit_history.headline: Moody's cut Enron to Baa2 and kept it under review
credit_history.summary: Moody's lowered Enron's senior unsecured debt to Baa2 and kept the rating under review for downgrade.

credit_history.headline: S&P cut Enron to BBB and kept CreditWatch negative
credit_history.summary: S&P lowered Enron's rating from BBB+ to BBB and kept the name on CreditWatch negative.

credit_history.headline: Fitch cut Enron to BBB- and kept watch negative
credit_history.summary: Fitch lowered Enron's senior unsecured debt from BBB+ to BBB- and maintained a negative watch.

credit_history.headline: Moody's and S&P cut Enron below investment grade
credit_history.summary: By November 28, 2001, Moody's and S&P had cut Enron to junk, which triggered the liquidity spiral that preceded the bankruptcy filing.
